retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operation is a side effect of the work completion, not a get/set/put operation that the caller relies on.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to perform a GPU TLB flush and signal a fence; the dma_fence_put at the end is incidental cleanup, not the main purpose. The function does not pass a reference-counted object to the caller.
